_description: Data payload for the Sub-audit issues count widget containing aggregated statistics at the global and sub-audit level.

resolutionAndBacklogHealth._description: Tracks ageing delays like >21 days and highly resolved metrics (<7 days resolution) for sub-audits.

topHealthySubAudits._description: Sub-audit types heavily resolved within 7 days. Contains up to 3 items.

riskAndPriorityExposure._description: Contains risk composition like High Risk and Zero Tolerance issues globally and across worst-performing sub-audits.

exceptionsAndHotspots._description: Identifies regions/zones with highest exceptions, recurring issues, and delays.

topZonesByRiskAndAgeing._description: Zones sorted by highest occurrences of critical risk, recurrences, and delayed timelines. Top 3 items.
